channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: HenryNdubuaku /maths-cs-ai-compendium | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Become a cracked AI/ML Research Engineer

item.title: Graphify-Labs /graphify | Python | N/A
item.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

item.title: chenyme /grok2api | Go | N/A
item.description: 面向 Grok Build、Grok Web 与 Grok Console 的多账号 API 网关

item.title: AIEraDev /Clypra | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: A modern video editor built with Tauri, React, and TypeScript. Focus on building free capabilities of premium capcut functionalities

item.title: penpot /penpot | Clojure | N/A
item.description: Penpot: The open-source design platform for Product teams that need scalable collaboration.

item.title: hasaneyldrm /exercises-dataset | HTML | N/A
item.description: 1,324-exercise fitness dataset — animation GIFs, 180×180 thumbnails, muscle-group & equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in 6 languages. The exercise data layer behind the LogPress app.

item.title: Raphire /Win11Debloat | PowerShell | N/A
item.description: A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.

item.title: Nutlope /hallmark | CSS | N/A
item.description: Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.

item.title: Dicklesworthstone /destructive_command_guard | Rust | N/A
item.description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.

item.title: mattpocock /skills | Shell | N/A
item.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

item.title: Shubhamsaboo /awesome-llm-apps | Python | N/A
item.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
